title: tanacetum coccineum subsp. coccineum
intro: Tanacetum coccineum subsp. coccineum, also known as pyrethrum, is a perennial plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae), native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant contains compounds with medicinal properties, including pyrethrins, which have antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and analgesic properties. These medicinal properties translate to various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating skin irritations and wounds. Tanacetum coccineum subsp. coccineum is often used in herbal preparations, including infusions, tinctures, and creams, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
